channel.title: GitHub VHDL Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of VHDL in GitHub

item.title: aws/aws-fpga
item.description: Official repository of the AWS EC2 FPGA Hardware and Software Development Kit

item.title: OSVVM/OSVVM

item.title: slaclab/surf
item.description: A huge VHDL library for FPGA development
